title: Piece of String
tagline: VR photogrammetry piece — follow a string through a real home and the memories left behind
description: An Architectural dreamscape rendered at home
what:
An Architectural dreamscape rendered at home

Follow a piece of string through this real home, and explore the emotions and memories that people leave behind in the spaces they inhabit.

This work questions the way a space can affect you when you're not in it, or when it's gone. When the only record of it is a digital representation that you can step into only through a VR headset, or on a computer screen. Does it evoke the same emotions? What does it mean if the answer is yes?

Photogrammetry scans captured on DSLR and processed in Reality Capture

Meshes cleaned in VR in Oculus Medium

Models decimated and compiled in Blender
why:
Built in Unity

Play the experience

RECOGNITION

NEWVIEW International VR Award

TUTORIALS
